honest_issues: This lane did not import into CVAT; it only provides a dry-run import script proof because CVAT/network import is assigned to a separate local lane.
The all-row Phase-B queue is 43,230 frames, so w6 is 68 sessions, about 180.1 owner labeling hours at 240 frames/hour, not just a small several-session package.
W6 is package/labeling fuel only. It does not change BALL promotion status or VERIFIED=0.
The full repo-wide suite was not run; I ran the requested labelpack/guardrail blast radius plus repo-structure audits. The worktree contains many unrelated dirty files from other lanes, preserved.
